basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant fields
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Candidates with UG (or) PG degrees can apply. For UG degree B.E./B.Tech. in Robotics and Automation, Mechatronics, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Information Technology or Computer Science and Engineering with strong programming skills (Python/C++), knowledge of embedded systems, and experience in robotics hardware/software integration. OR For PG degree: M.E./M.Tech. In Robotics, Mechatronics, Control and Automation, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Embedded Systems and Technology, Control and Instrumentation Engineering, VLSI Design and Embedded Systems, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, Computer Science and Engineering or Industrial Engineering. Desirable Skills: Experience in ROS (Robot Operating System), sensor integration (LiDAR, cameras), and navigation algorithms. Knowledge of image processing and machine learning for object/area recognition. Familiarity with multi-robot coordination and battery management systems. Prior hands-on experience with mobile robot platforms (e.g., TurtleBot, Jetson-based systems).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant position at Anna University is 10 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. degree in specific engineering disciplines such as Robotics, Mechatronics, ECE, EEE, IT, or CSE, with relevant programming and integration skills.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an interview. Document verification will also be conducted as part of the final selection procedure.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at Anna University is a contractual job. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure, as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Assistant. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Assistant position is Chennai, Tamil Nadu, at Anna University. The specific department or project details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with a B.Tech. degree apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a B.E./B.Tech. degree in specified fields like Robotics and Automation, Mechatronics, ECE, EEE, IT, or CSE are eligible to apply, provided they meet the programming and integration skill requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.
